textByHashes.189a04fadc167316e702a6f348d03ea9c3ac1497: Hello. How can I help you?
textByHashes.5100a19954d82000178589120fbf8376bf9f0d27: You need those useless, undead chickens? How odd you adventurers are.
textByHashes.285f899100e9984fde4e530877e494c33dd3e3b2: You need to talk to my husband, though - not that I can these days.
textByHashes.f3c18a6ff6f9402373a211e5bd0e3c8634677ccc: Can't you see, he is dead. I can't talk to the dead.
textByHashes.c08df139ca14fbe3a503311b06c2c1526b8f9e49: The curse of undeath was so cruel; all the men out here succumbed, but Lyra and I were left alive.
textByHashes.9f7ce1dedb03e5f4dc162f1971fb2458e6b214ef: Tell him I love him but I can't find our savings. I know he had our collection of gold and 'prize cow' rosettes just before the curse struck.
textByHashes.2901e57c808f5efd2be7e8c16bd9eaadc3a75d22: Have you spoken to my husband yet?
textByHashes.89a8595839ebc7859a17b60d5e323b2dc060a40e: I'll need his bank pass, in that case.
textByHashes.a6537e03a9eead8ae76e93c51997705a3570e4bc: I tried that once, but all those other ghosts - and even the undead chickens and cows - scared me so much. I wouldn't try it again for all the cash in Varrock bank.
textByHashes.56bd18792c4f67d20781a3a7427cd2ebd3708205: Have you asked him about the bank pass?
textByHashes.eb51996cd6da213123963d4ae545b38112103fb0: You're so clever; I've overheard passing adventurers say that there's some witch near here who changes ghostspeak amulets.
textByHashes.9359bd4721ee2aaf97414e5ef9b15e435d7db8e6: I think she lives a bit west of that mad Professor Fenksomething, past the Farming patch.
textByHashes.7bab080abfff5a76200ed79a3b43ce8b1c4f500f: Mysterious indeed, but in this case she actually looks pretty normal.
textByHashes.ff99dc0d249e6d51e13568de2c62d7205553ba37: Have you found a way for me to talk to my husband yet?
textByHashes.fc51ec93844697ccea26d86c90a5778841bc1277: Have you handed him an enhanced amulet?
textByHashes.9577c79be7dc45043fb6aae5994a07fe12e84c0e: You heard my husband: leave now!
textByHashes.f742c3cfc8a2b4cd29d0823f772894dd52a49e7c: Hello, friend, and thanks for allowing me to talk to my husband Malcolm. How can I help you?
